title: ItemsBlocker
description: Plugin that allows administrators to block specific items, enchantments, and potion effects.
body: # ItemsBlocker ## Description **ItemsBlocker** is a Minecraft plugin that allows administrators to block specific items, enchantments, and potion effects. The plugin provides a set of commands to manage these restrictions. ## Features * **Item Blocking:** Add/remove items from the blocked list. * **Enchantment Blocking:** Block enchantments, optionally specifying a minimum level. * **Potion Effect Blocking:** Block potion effects, optionally specifying a minimum level. * **Netherite Crafting Blocking:** Enable/disable smithing of netherite items. ## Commands All commands require the `itemsblocker.command` permission. ### Main command aliases * `/block` * `/blocker` * `/itemsblocker` ### Subcommands * `/blocker help`: Displays the list of available commands. #### Item Management * `/blocker item add `: Adds an item to the blocked list (e.g., `/blocker item add DIAMOND_SWORD`). * `/blocker item remove `: Removes an item from the blocked list. * `/blocker item list`: Displays the list of blocked items. #### Enchantment Management * `/blocker enchantment add [level]`: Adds an enchantment to the blocked list (e.g., `/blocker enchantment add sharpness 2`). * ``: The name of the enchantment (use Minecraft names, e.g., `sharpness`, `efficiency`). * `[level]` (Optional): The minimum enchantment level to block. Default: 1. * `/blocker enchantment remove `: Removes an enchantment from the blocked list. * `/blocker enchantment list`: Displays the list of blocked enchantments and their levels. #### Potion Effect Management * `/blocker potion add [level]`: Adds a potion effect to the blocked list (e.g., `/blocker potion add strength 2`). * ``: The name of the potion effect (use Minecraft names, e.g., `speed`, `strength`). * `[level]` (Optional): The minimum potion effect level to block. Default: 1. * `/blocker potion remove `: Removes a potion effect from the blocked list. * `/blocker potion list`: Displays the list of blocked potion effects and their levels. #### Netherite Crafting Management * `/blocker netherite `: Allows/blocks netherite item smithing. ## Permissions * `itemsblocker.command`: Permission to use plugin commands. * `itemsblocker.bypass`: Permission to bypass all item blocks. ## Libraries * [Annotation Command Framework (ACF)](https://github.com/aikar/commands) * [Okaeri Configs](https://github.com/OkaeriPoland/okaeri-configs)
